description: HealthEx is a patient-directed health data platform that helps individuals access, unify, and share their medical records with healthcare organizations, apps, and AI agents. It provides consent management and record access infrastructure, including standardized FHIR-based data retrieval.
summary: HealthEx exposes authenticated REST APIs, a separate FHIR R4 HTTP API, and an MCP server at `https://api.healthex.io/mcp`; auth is via organization-issued JWTs from API key/secret, MCP OAuth 2.0 client registration for patient-authorized MCP access, and test-patient credentials for development flows.
